arts.ttl: Exeter City urged to take frustration from defeat into Bolton clash
arts.sum: “We are a very dangerous team when we know what we are, who we are and how we are going to win football matches, so we recover and start preparation today (Thursday) and then going into tomorrow with the players, everyone has to be ready for another really difficult match, but be clear on how we are going to win that football match because so many things we did at Wycombe were very good. EXETER City manager Gary Caldwell has urged his players to use the frustration of their defeat at Wycombe Wanderers on New Year’s Day to motivate them for today’s League One clash with Bolton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Ian Evatt insists he he can prove his doubters wrong at Bolton Wanderers
arts.sum: Bolton Wanderes boss Ian Evatt remains convinced he can lead his side to success despite the mounting frustration on the terraces in recent months.

arts.ttl: Exeter City Women face toughest test away to league leaders Ipswich Town
arts.sum: Draws against the Grecians and Watford are the closest any team has come to stopping the impressive Tractor Girls in the league, the Suffolk side sitting three points clear at the top with two games in hand on Abbie Britton’s City. Sheehan’s side have already hit 52 goals in the league this season, conceding just five, two of those coming from Sophie Gillies in the 2-2 draw at St James Park back in September.

arts.ttl: How Bolton Wanderers could line up against Exeter City
arts.sum: A look at how Wanderers could line up against Exeter as they head back on the road in League One

arts.ttl: Bolton Wanderers boss won't be 'ripping up' his gameplan in mid-season
arts.sum: Bolton Wanderers manager Ian Evatt believes it would be the wrong call to stray from his footballing beliefs in the middle of a League One season.

arts.ttl: 'Different version' of Aaron Morley has returned to Bolton Wanderers - Ian Evatt
arts.sum: Bolton Wanderers boss Ian Evatt reckons Aaron Morley looks a different player after returning from a loan spell at Wycombe.

arts.ttl: Bolton Wanderers revive interest in League One star after failed summer bids
arts.sum: Bolton Wanderers are back on the trail of Peterborough United attacking midfielder Joel Randall, according to Football League… The post Bolton Wanderers revive interest in League One star after failed summer bids appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Exeter City 'let down by officials' in stoppage-time Wycombe loss
arts.sum: City manager Gary Caldwell was sent-off for his protests, before Aaron Morley stepped-up to dispatch the spot-kick in the bottom corner of the net to win it for the hosts who went back to the top of the table. It had looked as if they were set to earn a hard-fought and fully deserved point away to League One leaders Wycombe Wanderers before a stoppage-time penalty gave the Chairboys a 2-1 win.
